## useProcedureSelection() function

Hook for managing procedure selection.

Supports selecting from available procedures, adding new options, and removing options from the list.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function useProcedureSelection(options: IUseProcedureSelectionOptions): IUseProcedureSelectionResult;
```

## Parameters

<table><thead><tr><th>

Parameter


</th><th>

Type


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

options


</td><td>

[IUseProcedureSelectionOptions](./ts-chocolate-ui.iuseprocedureselectionoptions.md)


</td><td>

Hook configuration


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

[IUseProcedureSelectionResult](./ts-chocolate-ui.iuseprocedureselectionresult.md)

Object containing state and actions

## Example


```tsx
const { state, actions } = useProcedureSelection({
  baseSpec: { options: [{ id: 'proc-001' }], preferredId: 'proc-001' },
  draftSpec: draftVersion?.procedures,
  onUpdateDraft: (spec) => updateDraft({ procedures: spec }),
  onResetDraft: () => updateDraft({ draftVersion: undefined })
});

// Select a procedure
actions.select('proc-002');

// Add a new procedure option
actions.addOption({ id: 'proc-003', notes: 'Alternative method' });
```
